renderer.fontFamily: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, Liberation Mono, monospace

limits.pixelRendering: This is a cell-grid reference renderer, not xterm's browser renderer. Font rasterization and glyph fallback can differ by host. Dynamic OSC palette changes, blink timing, underline variants, and selection pixels are not reproduced.
limits.terminalCoverage: This TUI visual-review profile does not represent every native terminal.
